description_long: This is a whimsical windmill structure with a cylindrical stone tower, topped by a blue, shingled, conical roof. The windmill features a large wooden rotor with four blades attached to a central hub, extending from the upper section of the tower. A wooden balcony encircles the tower at mid-height, accessible by a small staircase leading up from the ground. The tower has a wooden arched door and several small, irregularly shaped windows, some with decorative greenery or painted accents around them. The base of the windmill is set on a rocky foundation, giving it a sturdy appearance. The overall design is rustic and charming, suitable for a park, garden, or themed urban area.
description: A charming cylindrical windmill with a blue conical roof, wooden balcony, and four large wooden blades, set on a rocky base with decorative windows and a small staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched wooden door, staircase, and partial balcony, with the windmill blades visible from the side.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the full span of the four wooden blades, with the balcony and windows visible behind them.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlighting the blue roof, round windows, and greenery, with the windmill blades seen edge-on.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear of the balcony, more windows, and the staircase leading up to the entrance, with broken blade tips visible.
